    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Allocation
    JPA entity representing an allocation of a filled order to a client account.
    AllocationRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Allocation entities.
    AllocationRequestDTO
    DTO for creating an allocation.
    AllocationResponseDTO
    DTO for returning allocation data.
    CheckResult
     
    CheckType
     
    ExecutionFill
    JPA entity representing an execution fill against an order.
    ExecutionFillRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for ExecutionFill entities.
    ExecutionFillRequestDTO
    DTO for creating an execution fill.
    ExecutionFillResponseDTO
    DTO for returning execution fill data.
    FillStatus
     
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Global exception handler for the Order-Execution-Service.
    LoggingAspect
    Centralized AOP Logging Aspect for the Order-Execution-Service.
    ModelMapperConfiguration
    Configuration class providing a globally-shared ModelMapper bean.
    OpenApiConfiguration
    OpenAPI / Swagger configuration for the Order-Execution-Service.
    Order
    JPA entity representing a trading order.
    OrderController
    API contract for Order management and the complete order lifecycle.
    OrderControllerImpl
    REST controller implementation for OrderController.
    OrderExecutionServiceApplication
    Main application class for the Order-Execution-Service.
    OrderLifecycleDTO
    DTO representing the full lifecycle view of an order, including its pre-trade checks, fills, and allocations.
    OrderRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Order entities.
    OrderRequestDTO
    DTO for creating or updating a trading order.
    OrderResponseDTO
    DTO for returning order data in API responses.
    OrderService
    Service interface defining all business operations for the Order domain.
    OrderServiceImpl
    Implementation of OrderService containing the core business logic for the complete order lifecycle — from placement through pre-trade validation, routing, execution, allocation, and cancellation.
    OrderStatus
     
    PreTradeCheck
    JPA entity representing a pre-trade compliance check result.
    PreTradeCheckRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for PreTradeCheck entities.
    PreTradeCheckResponseDTO
    DTO for returning pre-trade check results.
    PriceType
     
    ResourceAlreadyExistsException
    Custom exception thrown when attempting to create a resource that already exists.
    ResourceNotFoundException
    Custom exception thrown when a requested resource cannot be found.
    Side
